title: Register Chronik history brief effect experiment
goal: Prospectively freeze a natural-case control/treatment comparison for the coding history brief before any observation or effect claim.

acceptance.assertion: Control, treatment, scorecard, material threshold, cost, confounders, review and expiry are fixed before observations.
No retrospective cases or repeated productive mutations are presented as prospective evidence.
The initial decision is not_executed with zero observations and no productivity claim.
The experiment has no policy, routing, queue or runtime authority.

acceptance_summary.prospective-registration: Control and treatment conditions, additive binary scorecard, one-point material threshold, preflight-effort cost metric, confounders, review date and expiry are frozen in registration.v2.json.
acceptance_summary.natural-cases-only: The registration requires natural coding tasks in matched bands and independent observation; no retrospective cases are counted as prospective evidence.
acceptance_summary.no-effect-claim: results/decision.yml remains not_executed with zero observations and explicitly forbids an adoption or productivity assessment.
acceptance_summary.boundary: The experiment boundary explicitly denies automatic policy, routing, queue and runtime authority.

verification.outcome: The prospective Chronik history-brief effect experiment was already merged through Vibe-Lab PR #316 and remains correctly unexecuted pending natural cases; this closeout records the existing implementation without making an effect claim.
